label: Priesthood (dungeon stone)
notes: Stone walls + corridors. Floor is intentionally NOT provided -> falls back to space grammar (SpaceCyber stone floor). corridor-corner.glb has its floor mesh removed (floorless_corner); the generator lays a template-floor tile under it. colormap = dungeon atlas with brown dirt/rubble recolored to cool gray (tools/recolor_priesthood.py). corridor-corner.glb texture is embedded (re-exported); recolor won't touch it -- run tools/repair_priesthood_glb.py after Blender edits.
